UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOLCH, DEBORA J TRUSTEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FINLEY, PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 327 PHELAN AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, 94112, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** **THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELLED** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
